message:
fix(multi-engine-harness): correct quantile upper-tail indexing and add telemetry determinism tests

The quantile function now caps q_percent to 100 and uses ceiling-style
index computation ((len-1)*capped+99)/100 so p95/p99 report upper-tail
values correctly instead of under-reporting. LexerConfig initialization
switched to struct expression for forward compatibility.

New integration tests verify telemetry contract stability: schema version,
sample count, byte/token averages, allocs-per-token, and p50<=p95<=p99
ordering invariant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
